title: machine linux: start: panic
body:
New one-off flake in [machine linux f40 aarch64](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/4781183593086976/html/machine-linux-podman-fedora-40-aarch64-rootless-host-sqlite.log.html#t--podman-machine-set-set-machine-cpus--disk--memory--1):
```
[+0768s] podman machine set
           set machine cpus, disk, memory
...
[+0773s]   Image resized.
           Machine init complete
           To start your machine run:
         
           	podman machine start 88a858851be2
         
           /var/tmp/go/src/github.com/containers/podman/bin/podman-remote machine set --memory 524288 88a858851be2
           Error: requested amount of memory (524288 MB) greater than total system memory (134770749440 MB)
           /var/tmp/go/src/github.com/containers/podman/bin/podman-remote machine set --cpus 2 --disk-size 102 --memory 4096 88a858851be2
           Image resized.
           /var/tmp/go/src/github.com/containers/podman/bin/podman-remote machine set --cpus 2 --disk-size 5 --memory 4096 88a858851be2
           Error: new disk size must be larger than 102 GB
           /var/tmp/go/src/github.com/containers/podman/bin/podman-remote machine start 88a858851be2
           Starting machine "88a858851be2"
[+1373s]   SIGABRT: abort
           PC=0x48739c m=0 sigcode=0
.....long long panic
```

comments.body:
This is not new and not a panic. This was me intentionally adding SIGABRT on timeout so we can see where it hangs, https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/23162/commits/ada4e1a8c185f3329a6abdafc5b294c0692fdd36.

A panic would say `panic: blah...` at the first line not ` SIGABRT: abort`

So I say this is a dup of https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/22551
